# Project Guidelines

## Project Status
This is a scaffolding workspace ready for project initialization. Use Copilot to help bootstrap the project by specifying:
- Technology stack / programming language
- Project type (web app, library, CLI tool, etc.)
- Key dependencies and build tooling needed

## Setup Process
When initializing this project, Copilot will:
1. Create appropriate project structure and configuration files
2. Suggest build/test/run commands
3. Establish coding conventions and architecture patterns
4. Document project-specific conventions in this file

## Before Adding Code
- Update `README.md` with project description and purpose
- Choose a technology stack and include it in this file
- Add build system configuration (package.json, Cargo.toml, requirements.txt, etc.)
- Define local development setup instructions

## Documentation Convention
- Keep documentation files at the root or in `docs/` folder
- Link from this file to detailed conventions rather than embedding them
- Reference key files that exemplify patterns and architectural decisions
